creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Joe, can we just let this one die?

I started working on it, there were lots of issues, nothing I couldn't fix, but then I noticed compat6x


So this is a binary blob.


Do you have a particular interest in this port, or were you just picking random www ports to save?

It will be deleted in less than 2 days so we need to make a decision.  Unless there's an identified person that cares (and right now you have the only PR) then I say we just let it get pruned in 2 day.
